nodes.name: Diglossa
nodes.summary: Diglossa（Diglossa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied flowerpiercer、Glossy flowerpiercer、Moustached flowerpiercer等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Glossy flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: Glossy flowerpiercer（Diglossa lafresnayii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Glossy flowerpiercer。

nodes.name: Glossy flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: The glossy flowerpiercer (Diglossa lafresnayii) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland, and heavily degraded former forest. References
